executives.name: Elizabeth Comstock
executives.background: Elizabeth Comstock has served as a member of our Board since July 2021. Ms. Comstock previously served as Vice Chair of General Electric and as President of Integrated Media at NBC Universal.

executives.name: John Donahoe
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Nike, Inc. Former CEO of ServiceNow.

executives.name: John Rogers, Jr.
executives.background: Chairman, Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer of Ariel Investments, LLC. He founded Ariel in 1983.

executives.name: Tim Cook
executives.background: Tim Cook is the CEO of Apple and serves on its board of directors. Before being named CEO in August 2011, Tim was Apple’s chief operating officer and was responsible for all of the company’s worldwide sales and operations, including end-to-end management of Apple’s supply chain, sales activities, and service and support in all markets and countries. He also headed Apple’s Macintosh division and played a key role in the continued development of strategic reseller and supplier relationships, ensuring flexibility in response to an increasingly demanding marketplace.
